steps.title: Notice the stated contrast
steps.content: Robert says For you it's different, then describes Andrew as wedded to the soil and tied to the farm like their father. The passage is built around a contrast between the brothers.

steps.title: Match the main purpose
steps.content: A says the characters share a goal, B invents a mystery, and C invents a vacation. The text emphasizes how Andrew differs from Robert in his relationship to the farm. The answer is D.
